description: Shared party identity fields reused across schema bundles.

borrower_name.name: borrower_name
borrower_name.description: Legal name of the borrower or obligor as stated in the document.

governing_law.name: governing_law
governing_law.description: The state or jurisdiction whose laws govern the agreement (e.g., "CA", "NY", "DE", "England and Wales").

tax_id_masked.name: tax_id_masked
tax_id_masked.description: Masked tax identifier (EIN or SSN), showing only the last 4 digits.
